g.aria-label: - Dropped support for Node 18 — Node 20 is now the minimum required version.
g.title: - Dropped support for Node 18 — Node 20 is now the minimum required version.

g.aria-label: - Added `--watch` to the CLI to regenerate notes automatically on every new commit.
g.title: - Added `--watch` to the CLI to regenerate notes automatically on every new commit.

g.aria-label: - Large diffs are now streamed instead of being buffered in memory.
g.title: - Large diffs are now streamed instead of being buffered in memory.

g.aria-label: - Expired auth tokens are now rejected cleanly instead of returning a 500 error.
g.title: - Expired auth tokens are now rejected cleanly instead of returning a 500 error.

g.aria-label: - An empty commit range no longer crashes and is handled gracefully.
g.title: - An empty commit range no longer crashes and is handled gracefully.

g.aria-label: - Cached the parsed config for roughly 3x faster startup.
g.title: - Cached the parsed config for roughly 3x faster startup.

g.aria-label: - Expanded the quickstart with a tag-to-`HEAD` example.
g.title: - Expanded the quickstart with a tag-to-`HEAD` example.

g.text: From raw commits to a changelog
